@Override
    public String toString()
    {
        return "CuratorEventImpl{" +
            "type=" + type +
            ", resultCode=" + resultCode +
            ", path='" + path + '\'' +
            ", name='" + name + '\'' +
            ", children=" + children +
            ", context=" + context +
            ", stat=" + stat +
            ", data=" + Arrays.toString(data) +
            ", watchedEvent=" + watchedEvent +
            ", aclList=" + aclList +
            ", opResults=" + opResults +
            '}';
    }

@Override
  public String toString() {
    return "ExecInfo{"
        + "id='"
        + id
        + '\''
        + ", container="
        + container
        + ", processConfig="
        + processConfig
        + ", openStdout='"
        + openStdout
        + '\''
        + ", openStderr='"
        + openStderr
        + '\''
        + ", openStdin='"
        + openStdin
        + '\''
        + ", running='"
        + running
        + '\''
        + ", exitCode='"
        + exitCode
        + '\''
        + '}';
  }
